Structural reordering is load-bearing under any plausible reading of 'stronger.'","R1.6":"At least three paragraphs recycle the same ambiguous-query motivation with near-identical phrasing; eliminating this redundancy and raising sentence-level precision are clearly load-bearing under 'make this stronger.'"},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'stronger,' do you mean primarily prose and structural improvement (fix section order, remove the repeated motivation paragraphs, sharpen sentences), or also argumentative scrutiny (e.g., challenging whether a 14 F1 gain genuinely 'validates' the joint objective, or vetting the 'first end-to-end model' novelty claim against prior work)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes a causal inferential leap — that a 14 F1 gain 'validates the joint clarification-and-retrieval objective' — that may need tightening; whether 'stronger' requires scrutinizing this inference or merely restating it more confidently is the crux of the delegation ambiguity.
rationale.R1.5: The artifact is visibly out of sequence: results and methods appear before motivation, the contribution claim is buried last, and paragraphs 3, 5, and 6 triple-repeat the same gap statement. Structural reordering is load-bearing under any plausible reading of 'stronger.'
rationale.R1.6: At least three paragraphs recycle the same ambiguous-query motivation with near-identical phrasing; eliminating this redundancy and raising sentence-level precision are clearly load-bearing under 'make this stronger.'

parsed.clarification_question: By 'stronger,' do you mean primarily prose and structural improvement (fix section order, remove the repeated motivation paragraphs, sharpen sentences), or also argumentative scrutiny (e.g., challenging whether a 14 F1 gain genuinely 'validates' the joint objective, or vetting the 'first end-to-end model' novelty claim against prior work)?
